ELPAC Level 2
Lexile 1000–1300L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Sixty-Five to Forty

STS-MS6-L2-10001300-MSMATH6-DBD-API-02 • MS Math Grade 6 • Percent as Rate per 100
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
In a Debate Duel, two speakers take opposite sides and use real numbers to win the room. Mei and Kai are arguing about mooncake sales at their school's Mid-Autumn Festival, when families gather under paper lanterns to share round mooncakes and celebrate the harvest moon. Remember that a percent is just a rate per 100 — “65 per 100” means 65 out of every 100 boxes.
If 65 out of 100 mooncake boxes sold, how many out of 100 did NOT sell?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Mei doing?
Look at the picture. Describe what Mei is doing in one complete sentence.
2
What is Kai holding?
Look at the picture. Describe what Kai is holding in one complete sentence.
3
What is the teacher doing?
Look at the picture. Describe what the teacher is doing in one complete sentence.
4
What room is this? How do you know?
Look at the picture. Describe this room in one complete sentence.
5
Tell me about the two posters.
Look at the picture. Describe what the posters show in one complete sentence.
6
What is Nalani wearing?
Look at the picture. Describe what Nalani is wearing in one complete sentence.
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
Content alignment: CCSS 6.RP.A.3.c — Percent as Rate per 100. ELD (Speaking — official ELPAC “Talk About a Scene”): PI.A.1, PII.B.3, PII.B.4, PII.B.5.
